label: Card List
description: A row of cards with an icon/image, heading, and description. Great for program tiles or feature highlights.

settings.heading: Our programs
settings.description: PNEC runs three core programs to keep Poway households prepared for emergencies — pick the one that fits your family.

settings.heading: Block coordinators
settings.body: A trained volunteer on every block who maintains the household roster and helps neighbors connect during an outage.

settings.heading: Emergency kits
settings.body: The 72-hour kit checklist — water, food, medications, and the small things you never think of until you need them.

settings.heading: Drills & training
settings.body: Free quarterly drills + the annual Emergency & Safety Fair. Practice now, not when it counts.

settings.heading: Volunteer with PNEC
settings.description: PNEC is 100% volunteer-run. Two ways to start.

settings.heading: Block coordinator
settings.body: Spend a few hours a year keeping your block ready. Training and materials provided — no prior experience needed.

settings.heading: Event helper
settings.body: Show up the day-of for the Safety Fair, fire drills, or community outreach booths. As much or as little as you want.
